citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: Search engines (e.g., Google) and intelligent assistants (e.g., Siri, Alexa) have a collection of specialized and general purpose modules they draw upon to answer different types of questions.
